summary: Iteration 86: Verified daily reports now pull from REAL MongoDB data instead of hardcoded values. All 41 backend tests passed (100%). GM Flash shows real hk_rooms occupancy (31/65=47.7%), real spa_appointments revenue ($1,310), real guest_intelligence VIPs (James Smith, Michael Chen with allergens). Chef Daily shows real ird_orders revenue ($316) and covers (14), real allergen alerts from guest_intelligence (2 guests). NEW Labor Forecast endpoint working with 6 outlets and position-level staffing. Frontend panels display real data correctly. Guest ordering flow working end-to-end.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (GM Flash, Chef Daily, Guest Ordering all working)

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing seeded MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 verified daily reports now use REAL MongoDB data. Key collections: hk_rooms (65 total, 31 occupied), ird_orders (14 orders, $316 revenue), minibar_charges ($6), spa_appointments (8 appts, $1,310), guest_intelligence (3 profiles, 2 VIP with allergens: James Smith - shellfish/tree nuts/peanuts, Michael Chen - dairy/eggs), concierge_tickets (9 total, 6 open), eng_work_tickets (8 total, 6 open), guest_menu (31 items). GM Flash panel shows: 47.7% occupancy, $289.50 ADR, $1,310 spa revenue, VIP list with allergen notes, 6 open concierge + 6 open engineering tickets. Chef Daily shows: 14 IRD covers, $316 IRD revenue, 2 allergen guests with badges, 86'd items. NEW Labor Forecast at /api/daily-reports/labor/forecast shows 6 outlets (restaurant, ird, banquet, bar, spa, housekeeping) with position-level staffing needs based on occupancy.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/daily-reports/gm-flash - returns 200, data_source='live_mongodb'
GM Flash yesterday.rooms_sold = 31 (matches real hk_rooms occupied)
GM Flash yesterday.rooms_total = 65 (matches real hk_rooms count)
GM Flash fb_revenue >= $322 (includes real ird_orders + minibar)
GM Flash spa_revenue = $1,310 (from real spa_appointments)
GM Flash operations.vip_in_house includes James Smith and Michael Chen
GM Flash VIP notes include allergen info from guest_intelligence
GM Flash open_issues.concierge = 6, engineering = 6 (from real tickets)
GM Flash variance calculations present (occupancy, adr, revpar)
GM Flash comp_set penetration_index > 100 for all metrics
GM Flash departments include real revenue from collections
GET /api/daily-reports/chef-daily - returns 200, data_source='live_mongodb'
Chef Daily costs.ird_revenue_actual = $316 (from real ird_orders)
Chef Daily covers.ird.actual = 14 (from real ird_orders count)
Chef Daily allergen_summary.total_guests_with_allergens = 2
Chef Daily allergen guests have correct names and allergens
Chef Daily critical_allergens includes shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, dairy, eggs
Chef Daily eighty_sixed includes Branzino and Lobster Tail
Chef Daily cost_per_cover and revenue_per_cover calculated from real data
GET /api/daily-reports/labor/forecast - returns 200, data_source='live_mongodb'
Labor forecast occupancy_rooms = 31, total_rooms = 65
Labor forecast has 6 outlets (restaurant, ird, banquet, bar, spa, housekeeping)
Labor forecast shows position-level staffing (required, scheduled, gap, status)
Labor forecast gap analysis identifies understaffed outlets
Labor forecast housekeeping based on total rooms (65)
GET /api/daily-reports/labor/ratios - returns 200 with all 6 outlets
Regression: /api/health, /api/guest-intel/dashboard, /api/housekeeping/dashboard, /api/ird/orders, /api/spa/appointments, /api/concierge/dashboard all working
No ALICE or ProfitSword competitor references in any response
frontend_tests: GM Daily Flash panel opens from sidebar
GM Flash shows real occupancy 47.7% (calculated from 31/65 rooms)
GM Flash shows real spa revenue $1,310
GM Flash shows VIP guests James Smith (Rm 412) and Michael Chen (Rm 501)
GM Flash shows competitive set index with penetration > 100
Chef Daily Report panel opens from sidebar
Chef Daily shows IRD 14/35 actual covers
Chef Daily shows cost/cover $6.41, rev/cover $22.57 from real data
Chef Daily shows 2 allergen guests with allergen badges
Chef Daily shows 86'd items (Branzino, Lobster Tail)
Guest ordering at /guest-order works end-to-end (Room 412, Smith)

gm_flash_live_mongodb.details: GM Flash now pulls from real MongoDB: hk_rooms for occupancy (31/65=47.7%), spa_appointments for spa revenue ($1,310), guest_intelligence for VIP list with allergens, concierge_tickets + eng_work_tickets for open issues (6+6)

chef_daily_live_mongodb.details: Chef Daily now pulls from real MongoDB: ird_orders for revenue ($316) and covers (14), guest_intelligence for allergen alerts (2 guests), guest_menu for sold-out items

labor_forecast_new.details: NEW endpoint at /api/daily-reports/labor/forecast calculates staffing needs per outlet based on occupancy. Shows 6 outlets with position-level staffing (required, scheduled, gap, status)

no_competitor_references.details: No ALICE or ProfitSword references found in any API response

guest_ordering.details: Guest ordering at /guest-order works end-to-end with Room 412, Smith
